name: PhilateLister stamp catalog
author: Exergy ∞ LLC
description: Entity shard: LLM API provider (Gemini, OpenRouter, …) for appraisal.

entities.name: provider
entities.brief: Upstream API used to run a prompt invocation.
entities.description: Rows live in xframe/data/providers.json. Appraisal selects the client from provider_id (google_gemini → GEMINI_API_KEY + @google/genai; openrouter → OPENROUTER_API_KEY + chat/completions with vision).

fields.name: provider_id
fields.description: Provider key; appraisal maps each to a client (Gemini SDK vs OpenRouter HTTP).

fields.name: api_base_url
fields.description: REST API base URL (no trailing path after version segment where applicable). Gemini: v1beta base used by Google AI; OpenRouter: https://openrouter.ai/api/v1

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Env vars, headers, or auth notes.
